message:
test(pager): add bd-3wop3.8 acceptance tests for split-lock, group commit, sharded publish, and combiner

Six acceptance tests covering all four D1-CRITICAL changes:
1. test_split_inner_lock_allows_parallel_prepare — 4 threads overlap Phase A/B
2. test_group_commit_batches_frames — 160 commits in 93 I/O ops (1.72x batch ratio)
3. test_sharded_publish_no_reader_blocking — concurrent reads/writes on PublishedPages
4. test_no_data_loss_under_batched_commit — all pages present after 8-thread batched commit
5. test_combiner_wired_in_production — unique contiguous sequences from 8 parallel threads
6. test_16t_throughput_exceeds_sqlite — #[ignore], requires benchmark harness

br-3wop3.8 — acceptance test suite for split inner lock + group commit batching

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
